Title: Arcane
Actors: Kevin Alejandro, Hailee Steinfeld, Ella Purnell
Plot: The delicate balance between the rich city of Piltover and the seedy underbelly of Zaun. Tensions between these city-states boil over with the creation of hextech a way for any person to control magical energy in Piltover, and in Zaun, a new drug called shimmer transforms humans into monsters. The rivalry between the cities splits families and friends as Arcane brings life to the relationships that shape some of League of Legends' famous champions including Vi, Jinx, Caitlyn, Jayce and Viktor.
Awards: Won 8 Primetime Emmys. 41 wins & 13 nominations total
